title: Database and Entities
summary: Core domain entities in the DeltaCore data model.

blocks.heading: Tenant hierarchy
blocks.content: Company is the tenant root. Mine → Site → Equipment forms the operational hierarchy. All tenant-scoped entities carry Company_Id for isolation.

blocks.heading: Core entities (Phase 1)
bullets: Company, Mine, Site, Equipment — asset registry
FuelEvent — fuel consumption, refuel and anomaly events
Alert — operational alerts with lifecycle and severity

blocks.heading: Database scripts
blocks.content: SQL scripts live in scripts/postgresql/: 001-create-tables.sql and 002-seed-data.sql. Development may use EF EnsureCreated when enabled in appsettings.
